Oracc: HBTIN — Hellenistic Babylonia: Texts, Iconography, Names

OECT 09, 28 [Sale of shares in baker's prebend][via hbtin]

Obverse
o 1o 1

fSURtu₄ DUMU.MUNUS ša₂ mina-qi₂-bit—d60 A mkur-i DAM m⸢mu-ra-šu-u₂⸣ [DUMU ša₂ ...]

(o 1) Eṭirtu daughter of Ina-qibit-Anu descendant of Kuri, wife of Murašu [son of ...] voluntarily sold 1/6 of a day in the 20th day of [her cook's] prebend [before Anu, Antu], Ištar, Nanaya, Beltu-ša-Reš, and the gods of [all of] their temples, [monthly throughout the year] guqqānû-offerings and eššēšu-offerings and everything else [that pertains to the 1/6 of a day in the 20th day] of that cook's prebend, which is with [..., son of] Anu-ušallim descendant of Luštammar-Adad, and [all their] co-owners of the shares, [for ... mina, 2 šekels of refined silver], high quality staters of Antiochus [as the complete price, to] Kidin-Anu son of Anu-ahhe-iddin descendant of Hunzu, in [perpetuity]. label+ o 8 - o 10 [That silver, ...] mina, 2 šekels, the [complete] price of 1/6 of a day in the 20th day of [that cook's] prebend, Eṭirtu daughter of Ina-qibit-Anu [received] from Kidin-Anu son of Anu-ahhe-[iddin; she is paid].

o 22

ina ḫu-ud lib₃-bi-šu₂ ši-iš-šu₂ ša₂ u₄-mu ina U₄ 20-KAM₂ GIŠ.⸢ŠUB.BA⸣-[šu₂ lu₂MUḪALDIMu₂-tu₂ IGI d60 an-tu₄]

o 33

dINANA dna-na-a dGAŠAN-ša₂-re-eš u DINGIR-MEŠ E₂-šu₂-⸢nu⸣ [gab-bi ša₂ ITIus-su kal MU.AN.NA]

o 44

gu-uq-qa-ne₂-e u EŠ₃.EŠ₃-MEŠ u mim-ma gab-bi [ša₂ a-na ši-iš-šu₂ ša₂ u₄-mu ina U₄ 20-KAM₂]

o 55

GIŠ.ŠUB.BA lu₂MUḪALDIMu₂-tu₂ MU-MEŠ ik-kaš-ši-du ša₂ it-ti [... DUMU ša₂]

o 66

md60—GI A mlu-uš-tam-mar—dIŠKUR u EN-MEŠ ḪA.LA-⸢MEŠ⸣-[šu₂-nu gab-bi a-na x MA.NA 2 GIN₂ KU₃.BABBAR qa-lu-u₂]

o 77

⸢is⸣-ta-tir-ra-nu ša₂ man-ti-ʾi-i-ku-su bab-ba-⸢nu⸣-[u₂-tu₂ a-na ŠAM₂ TIL-MEŠ a-na]

o 88

[m]ki-din—d60 DUMU ša₂ md60—ŠEŠ-MEŠ—MU A mḫun-zu-⸢u₂ ana u₄-mu⸣ [ṣa-a-tu₂ tat-ta-din KU₃.BABBAR a₄]

o 99

[x] ⸢MA⸣.NA 2 GIN₂ ŠAM₂ ši-iš-šu₂ ⸢ša₂⸣ u₄-mu ina U₄ 20-KAM₂ GIŠ.[ŠUB.BA lu₂MUḪALDIMu₂-tu₂ MU-MEŠ TIL-MEŠ]

o 1010

[f]⸢SUR⸣tu₄ DUMU.MUNUS ša₂ mina-qi₂-bit—d60 ⸢ina ŠU⸣-MIN mki-din—d60 DUMU ša₂ md60—ŠEŠ-[MEŠ-MU maḫ-rat e-ṭir-tu₂]

o 1111

[u₄]-mu pa-qa-ri ana muḫ-⸢ḫi ši-iš⸣-šu₂ ša₂ u₄-mu ina U₄ 20-KAM₂ GIŠ.ŠUB.BA lu₂[MUḪALDIMu₂-tu₂ MU-MEŠ]

(o 11) Should a claim concerning the 1/6 of a day in the 20th day of that cook's [prebend] arise, Eṭirtu, the seller of the 1/6 of a day in the 20th day of that cook's prebend daughter of Ina-qibit-Anu and the wife of Murašu [...] will clear (it) 12-fold [and will pay (it) to Kidin-Anu]. label+ o 14 - r 2 She [bears responsibility] for the clearing [of] that [prebend] in [perpetuity] for Kidin-[Anu]. label+ r 2 - r 3 That 1/6 of a day in the 20th day of the that [cook's] prebend [belongs to Kidin-Anu son of] Anu-ahhe-iddin descendant of Hunzu in perpetuity.

o 1212

⸢it⸣-tab-šu-u₂ fSURtu₄ na-din-at ši-iš-šu₂ ša₂ u₄-mu ina U₄ 20-[KAM₂ GIŠ.ŠUB.BA]

o 1313

lu₂MUḪALDIMu₂-tu₂ MU-MEŠ DUMU.MUNUS ša₂ mina-qi₂-bit-⸢d60 u⸣ [m]⸢mu-ra-šu-u₂ DAM⸣ [...]

o 1414

⸢a-di⸣ 12-TA.AM₃ u₂-mar-raq-⸢u₂?⸣-[ma a-na mki-din—d60 ina-an-din-u₂ pu-ut a-ḫa-miš]

Reverse
r 1r 1

[a]-⸢na⸣ mu-ru-⸢qu⸣ [ša₂ GIŠ.ŠUB].⸢BA MU-MEŠ a-na⸣ [u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₂] a-na m⸢ki-din⸣-[d60]

r 22

[na]-⸢šu⸣-u₂ ši-iš-šu₂ ša₂ ⸢u₄-mu⸣ ina U₄ 20-KAM₂ GIŠ.⸢ŠUB⸣.[BA lu₂MUḪALDIM]u₂-tu₂ MU-⸢MEŠ⸣ [ša₂ mki-din—d60 DUMU ša₂]

r 33

⸢m⸣d60—ŠEŠ-MEŠ—MU A mḫun-zu-u₂ a-na u₄-mu ṣa-⸢a-tu₂ šu-u₂⸣

2 lines uninscribed
(witnesses)
r 44

lu₂mu-kin₇ md60—AD-GUR DUMU [ša₂] md60—ik-⸢ṣur⸣ [A] ⸢mŠEŠ-ʾu⸣-u₂-tu md60—ŠEŠ—GAL₂ši [...]

(r 4) Witness: Anu-ab-utir son [of] Anu-ikṣur [descendant of] Ahʾutu; Anu-ah-ušabši [...] son of Ša-Anu-iššu descendant of Ekur-[zakir]; Tattan[nu] son of [...] descendant of Ekur-Zakir; Anu-uballiṭ son of Ina-qibit-Anu descendant of Hunzu; [...] Anu-ab-uṣur descendant of Hunzu; Anu-ahhe-iddin son of Tattannu [... ...]-Anu son of Ubar descendant of Kuri; Tanittu-Anu son of Kidin-[Anu ...] son of [...].

r 55

DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ mša₂—d60—⸢iš-šu-u₂ A⸣-MEŠ mE₂.⸢KUR⸣-[za-kir m]⸢tat-tan⸣-[nu] DUMU ša₂ m[...]

r 66

A mE₂.KUR-⸢za-kir⸣ md60—DINiṭ DUMU ša₂ mina-⸢qi₂-bit-d60 A mḫun-zu-u₂⸣ [... DUMU ša₂]

r 77

md60—AD—URI₃ A mḫun-zu-u₂ md60—ŠEŠ-⸢MEŠ⸣-MU DUMU ša₂ mtat-tan-⸢nu⸣ [...]

r 88

[mx]-⸢d60⸣ DUMU ša₂ mu₂-bar ⸢A mkur-i mta-nit-tu₄⸣—d60 DUMU ša₂ m⸢ki-din⸣-[d60 ...]

r 99

(colophon)
beginnings of 3 lines lost; probably uninscribed
r 1010

[... man-ti-ʾi-i]-⸢ku⸣-su ⸢LUGAL⸣

(r 10) [... Antio]chus (being) king.

remainder broken
